Courses & Collaborations

Learn AI,
properly.

Foundational and advanced AI courses delivered with local mentorship, peer learning, and community support — in collaboration with global partners.

AI Foundations w/ Google DeepMind

AI Foundations

A foundational course in artificial intelligence covering core concepts, modern techniques, and hands-on practice.

View course →
Machine Learning

Machine Learning Fundamentals

A practical introduction to classical machine learning — regression, classification, clustering, and the evaluation methods that hold them up.

View course →
Deep Learning w/ Google DeepMind

Deep Learning

From neural network basics through transformers — building, training, and reasoning about deep models.

View course →

TRI AI Dispatch

Monthly updates on programmes, research, and opportunities — delivered straight to your inbox.
